papers.title: Build, Judge, Optimize: A Blueprint for Continuous Improvement of Multi-Agent Consumer Assistants
papers.innovation: Presents a comprehensive blueprint for moving multi-agent systems from prototype to production, tackling the underexplored challenges of evaluating multi-turn interactions and optimizing tightly coupled multi-agent systems for continuous improvement.
papers.benchmarks: Addresses challenges in evaluating multi-turn interactions and optimizing tightly coupled multi-agent systems, providing a framework for practical, production-level assessment.
papers.use_case: Development and continuous improvement of conversational shopping assistants and general multi-agent consumer assistants in real-world production environments.

papers.title: AgentSelect: Benchmark for Narrative Query-to-Agent Recommendation
papers.innovation: Introduces a principled methodology and benchmark for navigating the exploding space of LLM agent configurations, enabling engineers to effectively select the most suitable agent for a given narrative query or task, bridging a critical gap in agent ecosystem management.
papers.benchmarks: Proposes 'AgentSelect,' a novel benchmark specifically designed for narrative query-to-agent recommendation, facilitating comparative evaluation of agent selection strategies.
papers.use_case: Practical task automation via LLM agents, principled agent selection, and managing the increasing complexity of agent ecosystems for deployment.

papers.title: Mozi: Governed Autonomy for Drug Discovery LLM Agents
papers.innovation: Tackles two critical deployment bottlenecks for LLM agents in high-stakes domains: unconstrained tool-use governance and poor long-horizon reliability, proposing a framework for governed autonomy that unifies scientific reasoning with computation.
papers.benchmarks: Addresses fundamental reliability and governance issues crucial for the deployment of LLM agents in complex, dependency-heavy scientific workflows and high-stakes environments.
papers.use_case: Deployment of tool-augmented LLM agents in high-stakes domains like drug discovery, and generally for any application requiring robust governance over tool-use and long-term reliability.
